title: Elastic on Elastic: How we monitor our own services, websites, and operations
summary: At Elastic, we act as “customer zero,” using our own platform to monitor everything. Unified telemetry, AI-driven insights, and automated workflows streamline detection and response — reducing MTTD/MTTR and giving teams a single source of truth.
